title: New test failures when vendoring Buildah v1.44.0 into Podman's main branch, soon to be Podman 6.0
body:
### Issue Description

The following tests are failing when vendoring Buildah v1.44.0 into Podman main, which will become Podman 6.0.  Noted in test/buildah-bud/apply-podman-deltas

 - 459 bud-source-date-epoch-arg
 - 460 bud-with-source-date-epoch-env
 - 461 bud-with-timestamp-config-effects
 - 477 bud --layers should not include pulled up parent directories of mount points
 - 478 bud should include excluded pulled up parent directories in squashed images
 - 492 bud-windows-host-process-container
 - 493 bud-windows-with-timestamp-reproducible
 - 494 bud-windows-with-source-date-epoch-reproducible
 - bud-source-date-epoch-arg

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28805/checks?check_run_id=78413059752
